structured_workout.summary: ~22 min full-body dumbbell circuit — 3 sets each of biceps curl, shoulder press, lying triceps extension, bent-over reverse-grip row, lying fly, shoulder matrix (lateral / Y / reverse fly), lying pullover, and spiderman crunch (core). 30s work / 15s rest. Progress by adding weight.
WarmUp v1.3 · Main 5 × 2min @120% (2min @60% recover) · CoolDown 10 min ramp
10 min ramp → 55 min @67% → 10 min ramp
WarmUp v1.3 · Main 2 × 25 min @89% (3 min @60% recover) · CoolDown 10 min ramp
5 min ramp → 30 min @65% with cadence surges (5 × 1 min @100–105 rpm) → neuromuscular block 6 × (12 s @185% + 2:48 @55%) → 5 min @50%
~15 min bodyweight circuit — 3 rounds of squat, dead bug, mountain climber, glute bridge, and push-up (10 reps each), 30s rest between rounds. Progress by adding reps.
10 min ramp → 100 min @65–72% (midpoint 68%) → 10 min ramp
